creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, May 22, 2000 at 11:07:55PM +0200, Rémi Guyomarch wrote:
> > I will NOT make mutt depened on the devel/gettext port as I HATE the GTK
> > *&%^ and anything associated with it.  Making it depend on devel/gettext
> > will do nothing but make my life as maintainer harder.
> 
> I don't get it. Can you elaborate ?

If devel/gettext is a dependacy for Mutt, then that is something else
that I have to keep updated, else I cannot maintain mutt.  Since so many
other things (such as Gtk and things that depend on it) are also
dependant on it, I could break other binaries in updating my installation
of gettext just to compile Mutt.  I am not willing to go that path.
